title: The Economic and Social Values of the University Research Enterprise — D-RED Three-Part Series
content: Three-PDF series from the 2022-07-13 Monthly D-RED Seminar. Part 1 (Kamangar): ORA15A Value of Research Part 1 and Conclusions. Part 2 (Scott Knoche, PhD): /TrainingPresentations/ORA15B Value of Research Part 2 Scott Knoche.pdf. Part 3 (Wayne Swann): /TrainingPresentations/ORA15C Value of Research Part 3 Wayne Swann.pdf. All three parts share the same Zoom recording URL. Together they argue the economic and social value of the university research enterprise from three vantage points.
